data.flowmaster-alerts.yml:
groups:
- name: flowmaster-service-health
  rules:
  - alert: ServiceDown
    expr: up{job=~"flowmaster-.*"} == 0
    for: 1m
    labels:
      severity: critical
      service: "{{ $labels.job }}"
    annotations:
      summary: "Service {{ $labels.job }} is down"
      description: "Service {{ $labels.job }} has been down for more than 1 minute"
      runbook_url: "https://flowmaster.runbook.com/service-down"

  - alert: HighErrorRate
    expr: |
      sum(rate(http_requests_total{status=~"5..", job=~"flowmaster-.*"}[5m]))
      /
      sum(rate(http_requests_total{job=~"flowmaster-.*"}[5m]))
      * 100 > 5
    for: 2m
    labels:
      severity: warning
    annotations:
      summary: "High error rate detected in FlowMaster services"
      description: "Error rate is above 5% for the last 5 minutes"
      runbook_url: "https://flowmaster.runbook.com/high-error-rate"

  - alert: HighLatency
    expr: |
      histogram_quantile(0.95, rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"flowmaster-.*"}[5m])) > 5
    for: 2m
    labels:
      severity: warning
    annotations:
      summary: "High latency detected in FlowMaster services"
      description: "95th percentile latency is above 5 seconds for the last 5 minutes"
      runbook_url: "https://flowmaster.runbook.com/high-latency"

- name: flowmaster-resource-utilization
  rules:
  - alert: HighCPUUsage
    expr: |
      (100 - (avg by(instance) (rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="idle"}[5m])) * 100)) > 90
    for: 5m
    labels:
      severity: warning
    annotations:
      summary: "High CPU usage on node {{ $labels.instance }}"
      description: "CPU usage is above 90% for 5 minutes on node {{ $labels.instance }}"
      runbook_url: "https://flowmaster.runbook.com/high-cpu"

  - alert: HighMemoryUsage
    expr: |
      (node_memory_MemTotal_bytes - node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes) / node_memory_MemTotal_bytes * 100 > 90
    for: 5m
    labels:
      severity: warning
    annotations:
      summary: "High memory usage on node {{ $labels.instance }}"
      description: "Memory usage is above 90% for 5 minutes on node {{ $labels.instance }}"
      runbook_url: "https://flowmaster.runbook.com/high-memory"

  - alert: HighDiskUsage
    expr: |
      (node_filesystem_size_bytes{fstype!="tmpfs"} - node_filesystem_free_bytes{fstype!="tmpfs"})
      / node_filesystem_size_bytes{fstype!="tmpfs"} * 100 > 90
    for: 5m
    labels:
      severity: warning
    annotations:
      summary: "High disk usage on node {{ $labels.instance }}"
      description: "Disk usage is above 90% for 5 minutes on node {{ $labels.instance }}"
      runbook_url: "https://flowmaster.runbook.com/high-disk"

- name: flowmaster-business-metrics
  rules:
  - alert: LowTaskProcessingRate
    expr: |
      rate(flowmaster_tasks_processed_total[15m]) < 1
    for: 10m
    labels:
      severity: warning
    annotations:
      summary: "Low task processing rate in execution engine"
      description: "Task processing rate is below 1 per minute for 15 minutes"
      runbook_url: "https://flowmaster.runbook.com/low-task-rate"

  - alert: HighFailedWorkflows
    expr: |
      rate(flowmaster_workflows_failed_total[15m])
      /
      rate(flowmaster_workflows_executed_total[15m])
      * 100 > 10
    for: 5m
    labels:
      severity: warning
    annotations:
      summary: "High failed workflow rate"
      description: "Failed workflow rate is above 10% for 15 minutes"
      runbook_url: "https://flowmaster.runbook.com/high-failed-workflows"

  - alert: NoNewProcesses
    expr: |
      rate(flowmaster_processes_created_total[1h]) == 0
    for: 30m
    labels:
      severity: warning
    annotations:
      summary: "No new processes created"
      description: "No new processes have been created in the last hour"
      runbook_url: "https://flowmaster.runbook.com/no-new-processes"

- name: flowmaster-database
  rules:
  - alert: HighDatabaseConnections
    expr: |
      pg_stat_database_numbackends{datname!~"template.*|postgres"} > 50
    for: 2m
    labels:
      severity: warning
    annotations:
      summary: "High database connections on {{ $labels.datname }}"
      description: "Database {{ $labels.datname }} has more than 50 active connections"
      runbook_url: "https://flowmaster.runbook.com/high-db-connections"

  - alert: HighDatabaseLockRate
    expr: |
      rate(pg_stat_database_deadlocks[5m]) > 0.1
    for: 2m
    labels:
      severity: warning
    annotations:
      summary: "High database lock rate on {{ $labels.datname }}"
      description: "Database {{ $labels.datname }} has high lock rate (>0.1/s)"
      runbook_url: "https://flowmaster.runbook.com/high-db-locks"

      description: "Failed workflow rate is above 10% for 15 minutes"

    expr: |
      rate(flowmaster_processes_created_total[1h]) == 0
    for: 30m

      severity: warning
    annotations:
